video_details.title: How to Set Up Your Trading Charts Like a Pro (Beginner’s Guide)
video_details.description:
After 15 years of trading and setting the all-time annual PNL record at Trillium, one of the top proprietary trading firms in the world, I am breaking down the exact chart setup I used throughout my entire career. In this video I walk you through my complete multi timeframe trading system, including the specific intraday charts, daily charts, and tick charts I relied on to make millions in the market. More importantly, I explain the reasoning behind every single decision so you can stop blindly copying indicator setups and start building a trading chart layout that actually fits your own style. Whether you are a complete beginner trying to figure out where to start or an experienced trader looking to clean up your screen, this breakdown will change the way you think about technical analysis and price action trading.


✅ Join my trading course ➡️: https://theonelanceb.com/

🐂 All free content is sponsored by Clear Street, my broker of choice! https://tinyurl.com/ClearSt-Lance

ABOUT ME

If you’re new to my channel, my name is Lance Breitstein. I spent over a decade trading equities at Trillium, setting the record for the highest PNL in a single year as their Top Trader. I trained dozens of traders to become successes while managing Trillium’s Chicago office. With over $100m in verified profits, I now spend my time focused on turning good traders into greats and greats into GOATs. Advisor to SMB Capital and mentor of 7- and 8-figure PER YEAR traders. I am to be profiled in the next edition of Jack Schwager’s Market Wizards.

The journey is never easy. Trading is one of the most difficult, but most rewarding jobs imaginable. I am here to help you on your path, wherever that leads you.

May you want it bad enough to overcome any obstacles.
-(The One) Lance B
